CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/CLIFFORD FRIED AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 250 MCALLISTER ST, #52, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMED- IATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 5PM, 3-1-94 - RENT & DAMAGES WVD. - EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN ATTY. FEES & COSTS - SECURITY DEPOSIT, IF ANY, TO BE RETAINED BY PL. - RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED - DEF. WARRANTS HE IS ONLY OCCUPANT OF PREMISES - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - ANY PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED - IF DEF. VACATES BY 3-1-94 PL. WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DISM. ACTION. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VEE, PETER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 250 MCALLISTER ST, #22, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAR-01-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. DEF. WARRANTS HE IS ONLY OCCUPANT SE. DEP. RETAINED BY PL. WRIT ISSUES IMMEDIATELY.
